title: College Projects Help
short: Guidance, planning, and delivery support for student projects.
details: Need a final-year project, mini-project, or technical college submission? We help with planning, architecture, implementation, and clean presentation.

title: Website Creation
short: Fast, accessible websites with great UX.
details: Fast, accessible websites with great UX. Design systems, SEO-ready structure, performance-first builds.

title: App Development
details: Cross-platform & native apps. Native features, offline-first design, robust backends and CI/CD.

title: Stratum Integration
short: Setup and integration of Stratum project planning system.
details: We deploy and customize Stratum for your team to map requirements, track deliverables, and keep projects moving with clarity.
